Free Books

Spinning a lot of plates this week so skipping the newsletter. As an apology, have ten free copies of Logic for Programmers.

  • These fiveare available now.
  • Nevermind Leanpub had a bug that made this not work properlyThese fiveshould be available at 10:30 AM CEST tomorrow, so people in Europe have a better chance of nabbing one.

Don't miss what's next. Subscribe to Computer Things:
